{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30854794?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/YLChen-007", "id": 30854794, "login": "YLChen-007", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwODU0Nzk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "## Impact
Three mutating endpoints in the evaluation test runs controller authorized state-changing actions using `workflow:read` instead of the action-appropriate `workflow:execute` scope. An authenticated user with `project:viewer` role on a project could start new evaluation test runs, cancel in-flight runs, and delete run records for workflows they only had read access to.

This issue only affects instances with Advanced Permissions (Enterprise/Cloud) where projects and viewer roles are in use.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.55, 2.25.7, and 2.26.2. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict project membership to fully trusted users only.
- Avoid granting viewer access to projects containing sensitive workflows.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T13:55:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-17T13:55:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Wrong OAuth Scope on Evaluation Test Runs Endpoints", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T13:56:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-664h-gpgq-h6xx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.55", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.55"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.26.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.26.0, < 2.26.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.25.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.25.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: n8n: Wrong OAuth Scope on Evaluation Test Runs Endpoints
